why_this_action.summary: Refreshed live directory-listing and backlink evidence after the latest submission burst so the loop can reuse real approvals (2 live listing(s)) instead of stacking more low-intent submissions.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
outreach-log.md: avoid duplicate submission work and repeated HN/Lobsters-only handoff
market_intelligence_latest.json: reusable competitor comparisons and positioning truths
apollo_status.json: managed outbound is authenticated and available for execution packaging
why_this_action.safe_runtime_fix: Patched backlink_status.py to track Claudetory submissions in the live confirmation snapshot and added coverage in test_backlink_status.py.
